text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today! The students are
heading to a special academy site for special
training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Of course, King Halo is no exception.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Trainer, look well and hard. I'm going to
need you to remember this moment moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
When you compare my figure from before summer
to after summer, you'll be astounded by how
much I'll have changed in such a short time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Someday, this lodge will become one of the
world's leading tourist destinations as a place
where King Halo once trained!
choice_data_list: It sounds like you're dreaming big!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I believe it's fairly modest in comparison to
what else I plan to accomplish.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Speaking of which, there are various things
I would like to do with this lodging here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Under my guidance, this place would be far
better.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's so awfully hot in here. First of all, I'd have a
much-needed air conditioner installed.
choice_data_list: (Actually, that's kind of a small dream...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stow my seditious thoughts away and instead
shift my focus to summer training with King Halo!
